pages.title: Ollama

headings:
The easiest way to build
with open models

pages.accessibility_tree:
- banner:
  - navigation:
    - link "Ollama":
      - /url: /
      - img "Ollama"
    - link "Models":
      - /url: /search
    - link "Docs":
      - /url: /docs
    - link "Pricing":
      - /url: /pricing
    - img
    - textbox "Search models"
    - link "Sign in":
      - /url: /signin
    - link "Download":
      - /url: /download
- main:
  - img "OpenClaw"
  - paragraph:
    - text: Power
    - link "OpenClaw":
      - /url: https://docs.ollama.com/integrations/openclaw
    - text: with Ollama
  - heading "The easiest way to build with open models" [level=1]
  - code: curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh
  - button:
    - img
  - paragraph:
    - text: paste this in terminal, or
    - link "download Ollama":
      - /url: /download
- heading "Automate your work" [level=3]
- paragraph: Get up and running with OpenClaw, Claude Code, and more in minutes using open models powered by Ollama.
- text: ollama launch openclaw
- button:
  - img
- link "See more apps →":
  - /url: https://docs.ollama.com/integrations
- paragraph: $ ollama launch openclaw
- paragraph: Installing OpenClaw...
- paragraph: Configuring model...
- paragraph: Adding web tools...
- paragraph: ✓ OpenClaw is running
- heading "Start local. Scale with cloud." [level=2]
- paragraph: Ollama's cloud gives you access to faster, larger models when you need them.
- list:
  - listitem:
    - img
    - text: Access larger models on datacenter-grade hardware
  - listitem:
    - img
    - text: Run many requests in parallel
  - listitem:
    - img
    - text: Get real-time information from the web
  - listitem:
    - img
    - text: Included free with an Ollama account
- link "Create account":
  - /url: /signup
- paragraph: Pro
- heading "Solve harder tasks, faster" [level=3]
- paragraph: Run 3 cloud models at a time with 50x more cloud usage.
- text: $20 / mo
- paragraph:
  - text: or
  - link "$200/year":
    - /url: /upgrade?plan=pro&interval=year
- link "Get Pro":
  - /url: /upgrade?plan=pro
- paragraph: Max
- heading "For your most demanding work" [level=3]
- paragraph: Run 10 cloud models at a time with 5x more usage than Pro.
- text: $100 / mo
- link "Get Max":
  - /url: /upgrade?plan=max
- heading "Your data stays yours" [level=2]
- list:
  - listitem:
    - img
    - text: Your data is never trained on
  - listitem:
    - img
    - text: Cloud models in United States, Europe, and Singapore
  - listitem:
    - img
    - text: Run entirely offline for mission critical work
- img
- heading "Get started with Ollama" [level=2]
- link "Download":
  - /url: /download
- contentinfo:
  - text: © 2026 Ollama
  - link "Download":
    - /url: /download
  - link "Blog":
    - /url: /blog
  - link "Docs":
    - /url: https://docs.ollama.com
  - link "GitHub":
    - /url: https://github.com/ollama/ollama
  - link "Discord":
    - /url: https://discord.com/invite/ollama
  - link "X (Twitter)":
    - /url: https://twitter.com/ollama
  - link "Contact":
    - /url: mailto:hello@ollama.com
  - link "Privacy":
    - /url: /privacy
  - link "Terms":
    - /url: /terms

    - heading "On this page" [level=2]:
      - button "On this page"
    - list:
      - listitem:
        - link "Libraries":
          - /url: "#libraries"
      - listitem:
        - link "Community":
          - /url: "#community"
- alert

pages.title: Pricing · Ollama
pages.accessibility_tree:
- banner:
  - navigation:
    - link "Ollama":
      - /url: /
      - img "Ollama"
    - link "Models":
      - /url: /search
    - link "Docs":
      - /url: /docs
    - link "Pricing":
      - /url: /pricing
    - img
    - textbox "Search models"
    - link "Sign in":
      - /url: /signin
    - link "Download":
      - /url: /download
- main:
  - heading "Pricing" [level=1]
  - img "Ollama"
  - heading "Free" [level=2]
  - paragraph: Get started with Ollama
  - text: $0
  - link "Download":
    - /url: /download
  - list:
    - listitem:
      - img
      - text: Automate coding, document analysis, and other tasks with open models
    - listitem:
      - img
      - text: Keep your data private
    - listitem:
      - img
      - text: Run models on your hardware
    - listitem:
      - img
      - text: Access cloud models
    - listitem:
      - img
      - text: CLI, API, and desktop apps
    - listitem:
      - img
      - text: 40,000+ community integrations
    - listitem:
      - img
      - text: Unlimited public models
  - img "Ollama"
  - heading "Pro" [level=2]
  - paragraph: Solve harder tasks, faster
  - text: $20 / mo
  - paragraph:
    - text: or $200/yr billed
    - link "annually":
      - /url: /upgrade?plan=pro&interval=year
  - link "Get Pro":
    - /url: /upgrade?plan=pro
  - text: "Everything in Free, plus:"
  - list:
    - listitem:
      - img
      - text: Access larger, more powerful cloud models
    - listitem:
      - img
      - text: Run 3 cloud models at a time
    - listitem:
      - img
      - text: 50x more cloud usage than Free
    - listitem:
      - img
      - text: Upload and share private models
  - img "Ollama"
  - heading "Max" [level=2]
  - paragraph: For your most demanding work
  - text: $100 / mo
  - link "Get Max":
    - /url: /upgrade?plan=max
  - text: "Everything in Pro, plus:"
  - list:
    - listitem:
      - img
      - text: Run 10 cloud models at a time
    - listitem:
      - img
      - text: 5x more usage than Pro
  - heading "Frequently asked questions" [level=2]
  - heading "Models" [level=3]
  - list:
    - listitem:
      - heading "Which models are available?" [level=4]
      - paragraph:
        - text: See the full list of cloud-enabled models
        - link "here":
          - /url: /search?c=cloud
        - text: .
    - listitem:
      - heading "Do models support tool calling?" [level=4]
      - paragraph:
        - text: Yes. Cloud models that are trained to support tools are tested for tool calling and with real agent workflows before they go live. If something isn't working, let us know at
        - link "hello@ollama.com":
          - /url: mailto:hello@ollama.com
        - text: .
    - listitem:
      - heading "What quantization or data format do cloud models use?" [level=4]
      - paragraph: Native weights, as released by the model provider. On modern NVIDIA hardware, models may use accelerated data formats supported by Blackwell and Vera Rubin architectures (e.g. NVFP4).
    - listitem:
      - heading "How fast is Ollama?" [level=4]
      - paragraph: Speed depends on model size, architecture, and hardware optimization. We target and monitor for low time-to-first-token and high throughput across all cloud models. Priority tiers with faster performance may be available in the future.
  - heading "Usage" [level=3]
  - list:
    - listitem:
      - heading "What are the usage limits for each plan?" [level=4]
      - paragraph: "Running models on your own hardware is always unlimited. Cloud usage varies by plan:"
      - table:
        - rowgroup:
          - row "Plan Usage Example use cases":
            - columnheader "Plan"
            - columnheader "Usage"
            - columnheader "Example use cases"
        - rowgroup:
          - row "Free Light usage Chatting with models, evaluating larger models, coding and AI assistants with smaller models":
            - cell "Free"
            - cell "Light usage"
            - cell "Chatting with models, evaluating larger models, coding and AI assistants with smaller models"
          - row "Pro Day-to-day work Larger models, coding automation, deep research":
            - cell "Pro"
            - cell "Day-to-day work"
            - cell "Larger models, coding automation, deep research"
          - row "Max Heavy, sustained usage Continuous agent tasks, multiple concurrent agents, large models over extended sessions":
            - cell "Max"
            - cell "Heavy, sustained usage"
            - cell "Continuous agent tasks, multiple concurrent agents, large models over extended sessions"
      - paragraph: Each plan has session limits that reset every 5 hours and weekly limits that reset every 7 days.
    - listitem:
      - heading "How is usage measured?" [level=4]
      - paragraph: Usage reflects actual utilization of Ollama's cloud infrastructure - primarily GPU time, which depends on model size and request duration. Shorter requests and prompts that share cached context use less.
      - paragraph: This is different from fixed token or request-based plans. Ollama doesn't cap you at a set number of tokens. As hardware and model architectures get more efficient, you'll get more out of your plan over time.
    - listitem:
      - heading "How much usage does each model use?" [level=4]
      - paragraph: Models consume a different amount of usage based on how difficult they are to run. To view a model's usage level, visit the model's page, where its usage level is displayed from small, light models (level 1), like gpt-oss:20b, to extra heavy models (level 4), like deepseek-v4-pro.
    - listitem:
      - heading "How does extra usage work?" [level=4]
      - paragraph: Pro and Max users can add extra usage balance. Ollama uses your included plan limits first, then draws from your extra usage balance when you go over those limits.
    - listitem:
      - heading "How much more usage does Pro include?" [level=4]
      - paragraph: 50x more than Free.
    - listitem:
      - heading "How much more usage does Max include?" [level=4]
      - paragraph: 5x more than Pro.
    - listitem:
      - heading "How do I know when I've hit my limit?" [level=4]
      - paragraph:
        - text: Check your usage
        - link "here":
          - /url: /settings
        - text: anytime. At 90% of your plan's limit, Ollama sends an email reminder. You can turn this off in settings.
    - listitem:
      - heading "How many cloud models can I run at once?" [level=4]
      - paragraph: "Concurrency limits ensure dedicated capacity for workflows that need multiple models running simultaneously:"
      - table:
        - rowgroup:
          - row "Plan Concurrent models":
            - columnheader "Plan"
            - columnheader "Concurrent models"
        - rowgroup:
          - row "Free 1":
            - cell "Free"
            - cell "1"
          - row "Pro 3":
            - cell "Pro"
            - cell "3"
          - row "Max 10":
            - cell "Max"
            - cell "10"
      - paragraph: Requests beyond your plan's concurrency limit are queued and processed as soon as a slot is available. Queued requests are held up to a fixed limit - if the queue is full, the request will be rejected until one of your concurrency slots opens.
  - heading "Privacy" [level=3]
  - list:
    - listitem:
      - heading "Where are models hosted?" [level=4]
      - paragraph: Ollama hosts models and compute resources primarily in the United States. To serve global demand, we may route to Europe and Singapore for additional capacity.
    - listitem:
      - heading "Is my prompt or response data trained on?" [level=4]
      - paragraph: Prompt or response data is never logged or trained on.
    - listitem:
      - heading "Who does Ollama partner with to host models?" [level=4]
      - paragraph: Ollama collaborates with NVIDIA Cloud Providers (NCPs) to host open models.
      - paragraph: When Ollama partners with providers, we require no logging, no training, and zero data retention policies in place.
- contentinfo:
  - text: © 2026 Ollama
  - link "Download":
    - /url: /download
  - link "Blog":
    - /url: /blog
  - link "Docs":
    - /url: https://docs.ollama.com
  - link "GitHub":
    - /url: https://github.com/ollama/ollama
  - link "Discord":
    - /url: https://discord.com/invite/ollama
  - link "X (Twitter)":
    - /url: https://twitter.com/ollama
  - link "Contact":
    - /url: mailto:hello@ollama.com
  - link "Privacy":
    - /url: /privacy
  - link "Terms":
    - /url: /terms
